name: Airvape XS GO 2021 Model Replacement Screens (6-Pack)
summary: Upgrade your Airvape XS GO Vaporiser with these premium Replacement Screens.
description: Upgrade your Airvape XS GO Vaporiser with these premium Replacement Screens. This pack of 6 includes 3 durable screens for the XS GO Magnetic Mouthpiece and 3 for the X Chamber, ensuring optimal performance. Designed specifically for the updated AirVape XS GO 2021 Models. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
